tools.name: factOfTheDay.getFactFod
tools.description: Get fact of the day for the given category.

tools.name: factOfTheDay.getFactFodCategories
tools.description: Get the list of supported fact of the day categories.

tools.name: numberFacts.getFactNumbers
tools.description: Get a random fact about a number

tools.name: onThisDay.getFactOnthisdayBorn
tools.description: Returns a random ( famous/ relatively famous ) person born on a given day and month

tools.name: onThisDay.getFactOnthisdayDied
tools.description: Returns a random ( famous/ relatively famous ) person died on a given day and month

tools.name: onThisDay.getFactOnthisdayEvent
tools.description: Returns a random ( famous/ relatively famous ) historic event on a given day and month

tools.name: privateFacts.deleteFact
tools.description: Delete a Fact entry identified by the id.

tools.name: privateFacts.putFact
tools.description: Add a Fact entry to the database (private collection).

tools.name: randomFacts.getFact
tools.description: Get a Fact belonging to the id.

tools.name: randomFacts.getFactRandom
tools.description: Get a random Fact for a given category(optional) and subcategory(optional).

tools.name: randomFacts.getFactSearch
tools.description: Search for random Fact which has the text in the query, for a given category(optional) and subcategory(optional).

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
